command: echo '=== Find MetaEditor ===' && find '/root/.wine/drive_c' -iname '*metaeditor*' 2>/dev/null && echo '=== Find .exe in MT5 dir ===' && ls -la '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/'*.exe 2>/dev/null && echo '=== All files in MT5 root ===' && ls '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/' 2>/dev/null
